title: U-Ra-SO4-CO3 PHREEQC research workflow evidence registry
status_note: This registry separates source discovery, metadata-reviewed candidates, and locally generated synthetic workflow data.

source_candidates.name: Canadian Database of Geochemical Surveys
source_candidates.use_in_study: Primary route for groundwater and hydrogeochemical survey discovery.
source_candidates.limitations: Raw spreadsheets were not downloaded in this run; individual surveys require unit, method, detection limit, and QA/QC normalization.

source_candidates.name: Groundwater, lake sediment and water survey, McClean Lake area, northern Saskatchewan, 1979-1980
source_candidates.use_in_study: Candidate real-world source for McClean/Midwest borehole groundwater PHREEQC inputs.
source_candidates.limitations: Metadata reviewed only; raw data and publications must be retrieved before quantitative interpretation.

source_candidates.name: Groundwater, lake sediment and water survey, Key Lake area, northern Saskatchewan, 1977
source_candidates.use_in_study: Candidate real-world source for U/Rn/He water survey context and drill-hole water samples.
source_candidates.limitations: Metadata reviewed only; raw water chemistry table was not parsed.

source_candidates.name: Eastern Athabasca Regional Monitoring Program FAQ
source_candidates.use_in_study: Regional monitoring context for water, sediment, fish, wildlife, COPCs, and QA/QC laboratory context.
source_candidates.limitations: Program-level environmental monitoring background; not a direct groundwater speciation table.

source_candidates.name: Regulatory Oversight Report - Uranium Mines and Mills
source_candidates.use_in_study: Regulatory and environmental-protection context for northern Saskatchewan uranium mines and mills.
source_candidates.limitations: Oversight summaries do not substitute for complete PHREEQC-ready groundwater chemistry.

source_candidates.name: CNSC Open Government datasets
source_candidates.use_in_study: Candidate route for radionuclide release datasets, including uranium mines and mills direct discharge.
source_candidates.limitations: Release loads/effluent records must be separated from groundwater sample chemistry.

source_candidates.name: PHREEQC Version 3
source_candidates.use_in_study: Software capability and database context for speciation, saturation-index, batch reaction, transport, inverse modeling, SIT, and Pitzer.
source_candidates.limitations: PHREEQC calculations require database-specific audit and field data validation.

source_candidates.name: Groundwater equilibration and radionuclide solubility calculations
source_candidates.use_in_study: Supports Ra sulfate/carbonate control hypothesis and database uncertainty framing.
source_candidates.limitations: DGR groundwater solubility context; not an Athabasca mine groundwater dataset.

local_workflow_data.use_in_study: PHREEQC skill validation using oxidizing carbonate, reducing brine, sulfate-rich tailings, and mixing scenarios.
Speciation, ionic strength, saturation-index, and mechanism-screening outputs.
Flat chart generation and paper results section.
local_workflow_data.limitations: Combines synthetic inputs with PHREEQC outputs.
